payload.purpose_context: The slug-to-mid8 branch/worktree naming is reimplemented ad-hoc in several places, each with its own idempotency or parsing bug — including #1978 which blocks spec-kitty merge for missions whose slug embeds its mid8. This mission binds that mapping to a single canonical seam and routes the broken call sites through it, then clears the remaining post-#1908 adversarial-panel findings (lane-merge atomicity, base-ref argument hygiene, and an accept-gate identity side-effect) so the merge/lane/accept paths are robust.
payload.purpose_tldr: Establish one canonical authority for mission-identity branch/worktree naming (fixing a recurring mid8 regression class incl. a P1 merge-blocker) and close the remaining post-#1908 adversarial-panel robustness findings.

RED-first: #1949 mission_id=None (057-foo-01KV6510 NNN+mid8 divergence) and #1918 resolve_mid8 coincidental-tail decline both failed before fix.

review.reference: Review passed (reviewer-renata): Foundation seam verified deeply. (1) worktree_dir_name BYTE-IDENTICAL both modes: mission_id=None => raw {slug}-{lane} with NO dedup (057-foo-01KV6510 stays verbatim, matching allocator f-string, zero worktree churn); mission_id present => lane_branch_name().removeprefix() embedded form; golden table encodes both legacy-NNN and embedded rows and tests assert both. (2) mid8_from_slug kept str return + demoted to heuristic; resolve_transaction_mid8 AND _coord_mid8 still resolve a genuine embedded mid8 (verified live) - no new fail-close. (3) resolve_mid8 authoritative: declared mission_id governs over divergent tail, declines on coincidental tail. (4) #1949 GENUINELY RED-first verified: base mission_branch_name(057-foo-01KV6510, mission_id=None) returned divergent kitty/mission-057-foo-01KV6510; fix makes mission_id=None match the mission_id path; LOCK test labelled as lock. (5) Failover one-shot warning (env-suppressible) + reset seam tested; modern-unresolvable raises BranchIdentityUnresolved. (6) All 7 downstream symbols in __all__ + importable (verified against lane copy); bare mission_dir_name + coord_dir_name(-coord)/coord_branch_name present for WP06. (7) ruff/C901/mypy clean, no NEW noqa/type:ignore; tests/lanes 299 passed + 134 branch-naming-consumer tests green. (8) Scope: only owned files. Minor non-blocking nit: mission_dir_name docstring says 'mirrors _compose_mission_dir exactly' but mission_dir_name strips NNN whereas _compose_mission_dir does not - they agree on all tested/real paths (formatted slugs); downstream WP06 wiring should pass formatted slugs.
